cards.front: What is the purpose of rollback in database management?
cards.back: To undo the changes made to the database after an insert operation

cards.front: What are the six attributes in the employee table?
cards.back: EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MANAGER_NO, SAL, COMMISSION
